name: Adequately Ever After
short_description: Save a princess! Kill an evil mage! Solve puzzles! Or just argue with the narrator and marry someone inappropriate. With dozens of different endings, adventure is yours to command in this satirical fairy tale.
detailed_description:
You are standing on a trail...

Wait, you don't like the second person perspective? You think it makes a game sound like a choose your own adventure novel?

Very well then...

Although before we get started, I'll need to know your name, your preferred pronouns and...

Wait, where are you going? We have a princess to save and quests to solve. Quests you might even enjoy, should you try your hand at them. Please, who knows what terrible things will befall the princess if you don't come back. This game won't play itself!

Adequately Ever After is a satirical visual novel in which you play a hero tasked with saving a princess, just to uncover a plot that will revolutionize a kingdom. Choose your path forward to achieve one of a dozen unique endings.
